prompt: Tap bb as the position anchor before acting.
why_v1: Position anchors keep action order clear before a track-specific action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. The big blind is the right seat anchor, so the cue read stays tied to the forced defender the line is testing.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The big blind is the right position anchor because guardrail decisions depend on knowing who is under the most pressure and who still has leverage.
